overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a dark fantasy video game showing an armored character walking along a desolate, foggy beach at night. The character moves steadily along the shoreline through a bleak landscape of bare trees and rocky outcrops, with heavy mist rolling in from the dark ocean.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the shoreline away from the camera, moving toward a distant rocky headland

entered.detail: leafless winter trees lining the left side of the shore
dark fog-covered water with gentle waves lapping the shore
dark sand and pebble beach along the waterline
large rocky outcrop jutting into the sea, shrouded in fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a desolate foggy beach at night, with bare trees on the left and dark misty ocean on the right. The ground is a mix of dark sand and pebbles, and a rocky headland is visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: shoreline transitions from wooded beach to rocky cliff area as trees give way to rock walls

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoreline as the terrain becomes rockier and more enclosed by cliffs

entered.detail: tall dark rock walls rising steeply from the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The beach becomes increasingly rocky as the character moves past the tree line and alongside tall cliff walls. The terrain shifts from sand to gravel and rocks, and the rocky headland passes to the left as the character continues along the misty shoreline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate shoreline that transforms from a sandy beach into a rugged, rocky coast. It begins with the character walking between a line of bare trees and a dark, misty ocean, moving across a ground of dark sand and pebbles toward a distant headland. As the character progresses, the terrain shifts from sand to gravel and rocks, and the tree line recedes to reveal towering cliff walls. The scene then opens up as the rocky headland passes to the left, with the camera continuing its steady advance along the increasingly jagged and misty shoreline.
